a:r.a:t: LangFuse traces + spans are a start, but SOC2 / GDPR / FedRAMP require cost attribution, immutable audit, PII controls, model governance, and red-team infra.
Traces log elapsed time but not tokens or dollars. Cannot answer 'cost per request / tenant / model.'
observability/cost_tracker.py hooks LLM callbacks, emits CostEvent(tenant, user, model, tokens, cents).
LangFuse is external. No local append-only log of who did what to which resource with what outcome.
audit_log.py — append-only Postgres table, write-once, S3 cold archive for multi-year retention.
Raw user text, files, and memory stored without PII scan. SSNs / PHI can leak into logs & traces.
Integrate Presidio (regex + NER); redact before write; require explicit consent for debug retention.
LLM_PROVIDER is env-var; any operator can swap to untested model with no approval workflow.
governance/model_policy.py — approved registry with risk_level, max_cost, min_accuracy; enforced at init.
benchmark/defense_corpus.py is skeletal. No continuous jailbreak / injection / exfil tests.
benchmark/red_team.py nightly — OWASP LLM Top 10 templates, regression alerts, canary prompts.
observability/callbacks.py, benchmark/defense_corpus.py, config.py — 5 compliance & governance gaps
